name: NETFLIX INC
summary: Netflix, Inc. is a global entertainment service offering TV series, films, games, and live programming across diverse genres and languages. Members pay monthly subscription fees and can stream content anytime, anywhere. Netflix offers multiple pricing plans including an ad-supported tier. The company produces original content and licenses content from studios and other rights holders, operating as a single business segment worldwide.

products.name: Netflix Streaming Service
products.description: Subscription-based streaming platform offering TV series, films, games, and live programming.

products.name: Ad-Supported Subscription Plan
products.description: Lower-cost membership tier with advertising, designed to meet varied consumer price needs.

products.name: Netflix Games
products.description: Video games available to members as part of the Netflix subscription service.

products.name: Consumer Products and Live Experiences
products.description: Merchandise and live experiences based on Netflix intellectual property and content.

partnerships.description: Netflix is involved in a transaction with WBD, referenced as a forward-looking matter in the filing.
